hardware: AMD Radeon GPU (DirectML) / Intel i7 CPU

benchmarks.description: Instantly drops totally irrelevant queries (e.g., 'how to bake cake').

benchmarks.pipeline_stage: Phase 2: Deep Semantic Triage (DistilBERT Tool Policy)
benchmarks.description: Distinguishes between ANSWER and TICKET using the 3-class semantic router.
Retrieves top 15 chunks, reranks top 3, evaluates hallucination threshold.
Generates 40-100 token response with inline strict citations.
